# Get a Signed Web Ad Impression Payload

**Web Service Endpoint**

An endpoint you provide to receive requests from devices to serve signed ad interactions.

## Discussion

You implement this endpoint on your server to provide signed SKAdNetwork ad payloads for web ads that users tap. The device calls this endpoint when a user taps an SKAdNetwork-attributable web ad.

To receive requests at this endpoint, your server needs to support the Transport Layer Security (TLS) 1.2 protocol or later.

The following is an example of an [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/AdImpressionRequest] payload:

```json
{
    "source_domain": "example.com",
    "source_engagement_type": "click_to_App_Store",
    "source_nonce": "t8naKxXHTzuTJhNfljADPQ",
    "version": "4.0"
}
```

A corresponding [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/AdImpressionResponse] to send in response to this payload is as follows:

```json
{
    "version": "4.0",
    "ad_network_id": "com.apple.test-1",
    "source_identifier": 3120,
    "itunes_item_id": 525463029,
    "nonce": "b7c9da2b-15c7-4f3b-9326-135f9630033d",
    "source_domain": "example.com",
    "timestamp": 1676057605705,
    "signature": "MEUCID/KZzaGxpa9jv9P1thWn8cHzcDq8ebDWEoarV1JrjNcAiEA6d9IqYErxFCrD96oR0rRftjVW6PRx37MC9QPS88OeE4="
}
```



The device uses the same encoding as `attributionSourceNonce` for the `source_nonce` value in the [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/AdImpressionRequest]. However, you use the dash-separated string representation of the UUID for the `nonce` value in an [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/AdImpressionResponse].

## Receiving a request for a web ad  payload

- **AdImpressionRequest**: The request body that devices send to fetch the web ad impression from the ad network’s server.

items.description: The request body that devices send to fetch the web ad impression from the ad network’s server.
items.name: AdImpressionRequest
